bird.summary: The chestnut-throated huet-huet (Pteroptochos castaneus) is a large passerine bird of the family Rhinocryptidae. At an average mass of 165…

locations.name: 温带森林
locations.summary: 温带森林是指位于温带地区，介于热带雨林和北方針葉林之间的森林。它是第二大陆地生物群落，佔世界森林面积的25% ，仅次于佔世界森林面積约33%的北方針葉林。南北半球均為温带森林，分佈在纬度25度至50度之间的區域 。由于其面积广阔，横跨多个…

relations.subject: Chestnut-throated huet-huet
relations.evidence: The species sometimes occurs in exotic Pinus radiata plantations, but only if there is a dense understory of shrubs, as it cannot move across habitat without dense understory as shown by a study of the fragmented Maulino forest.{{cite journal |last1=Vergara |first1=Pablo M
